item.title: 🎉 Paper accepted at the AI4Space Workshop (CVPR 2026).
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->

item.title: 🎉 Paper accepted at ICPR 2026.
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->

item.title: 🎉 Paper accepted at IJCNN 2026.
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->

item.title: 🎓 Started PhD at the University of Glasgow.
item.description: <!-- The [version 2.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/) of LAMMPS tutorial has just been published, and offers: * a new structure with a sphinx template * tutorials are now written in rst format, instead of html, which should facilitate future collaborations * a gorgeous dark mode (for the tutorials, not yet for the index page) The [version 1.0](https://lammpstutorials.github.io/lammpstutorials-version1.0/) is still visible here, but is not maintained and some commands are likely to be obsolete. -->
